subcodes.first_line: The Blessed Beauty accepted not the audience of any governor, and this caused the sovereign to fall into deep contemplation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمال مبارک ملاقات هیچ متصرفی را نپذیرفتند و سلطان باندیشه شد
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
